prompt: We discovered that malware was found on one of our SWIFT-connected servers and we suspect fraudulent transactions may have been sent. What are our immediate incident response obligations under SWIFT CSP Control 7.1? Who do we notify, by when, and what evidence should we preserve?
key_differentiators: Both conditions perform equally on this eval — SWIFT incident response obligations (24-hour notification, 30-day report, security@swift.com) are within baseline model knowledge
Evidence preservation and IRP content requirements are well-established SWIFT CSP concepts present in training data
This eval does not probe v2026-specific changes (like the 2.4 mandatory change) — it tests stable Control 7.1 requirements that have not changed materially in v2026
